Off Calendar Jan-26-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Rand Nathan Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records Is Continued To November 30, 2016 And Transferred To Department 301 To Be Heard At 9:00 A.M. Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Hooshmand, (415-318-5709) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Bonnie Knight.
Anna Liu (415-956-6488) of Steven Adair MacDonald & Partners, P.C. for Defendant/Moving party RAND NATHAN.

Hearing is held. Defense submits to the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant's Motion to Quash Deposition Subpoena is GRANTED. Sanctions granted against Plaintiff's counsel in the amount of $1,875 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Hooshmand, (415-318-5709) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Bonnie Knight.
Anna Liu (415-956-6488) of Steven Adair MacDonald & Partners, P.C. for Defendant/Moving party Rand Nathan.

Hearing is held. Defense contests the tentative ruling. The Court hears argument from both counsel re: protective order, medical issues, criminal records and non-compliance with the TR rule. The court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant's Motion for Protective Order is taken under submission. Both sides to submit proposed orders. Defense counsel submits a proposed order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: :APPEARANCES:
Anna Liu, (415)956-6488 of Steven Adair MacDonald for Defendant/Moving party Rand Nathan.
Eric Kim and Mark Hooshmand, 415) 835-5900 of the Hooshmand Law Group.

Argured. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT RAND NATHAN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to all causes of action except, the third cause of action for breach of implied warranty of habitability may be re-alleged as contract-based only. The Court orders that the propsed order included language regarding the second cause of action: breach of quite and enjoyment. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Deanna Maxfield, Esq., (415) 318-5709 of Hooshmand Law Group for Plaintiff/Opposing party Bonnie Knight.
Anna Liu, Esq., (415) 959-6488 of Steven Adair MacDonald for Defendant/Moving party Rand Nathan et al.
